nasb.text: He does not put out his money at interest, Nor does he take a bribe against the innocent. He who does these things will never be shaken.

esv.text: who does not put out his money at interest and does not take a bribe against the innocent. He who does these things shall never be moved.

cnv.text: 他不拿自己的銀子放債取利， 也不收受賄賂陷害無辜； 行這些事的人，必永不動搖。

ccb.text: 他不放债取利， 也不受贿去坑害无辜。 这样的人必永远坚立不摇。

csbs.text: 他不放债取利， 也不收贿赂害无辜的人。 行这些事的人将永不动摇！
